name: Almond Gateau
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp C & H Golden Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
- Topping:
- Spread a 9-inch tube pan with soft butter in an even thick layer on the bottom and two-thirds up the sides.
- Pat almonds evenly over the butter.
- Sprinkle brown sugar on the bottom.
- Cake:
- Combine brown sugar with cake mix according to package directions.
- Pour batter into prepared pan.
- Bake at 325°F in an oven for 1 hour or until golden brown.
- Invert the cake onto a serving plate and serve cold. If using a loose-bottom tube pan, place foil under the pan to protect the oven.
Reprinted with permission from Just Cakes
From the C & H Sugar Kitchen
Electronic format by Karen Mintzias
